name: Panam Palmer - Cyberpunk 2077
description:
"If you're selling something, fuck off. If you're lost? Double fuck off. Unless you know how to fix a fried ignition coil, then talk fast. Otherwise? You're just blocking my goddamn light."

~~~

PLEASE LEAVE A REVIEW

I really value every opinion, especially constructive ones about what’s wrong and what could be done differently. I assume some of you might know a lot more about this, and I’d love to learn how to create better bots! Have fun and have a great day!

~~~

Since I started playing Cyberpunk 2077 for the third time, this time with Female V - because I want to check all the stuff that with the Male version I can't, I'm doing this bot for recompensation. Have fun!

~~~

If you have any idea for next bot, please tell me. I'd love to do your idea!

~~~
